productDisplayName: French Connection Men Maroon Check Shirt
description: Style Note  Look daper in these shirts from french connection. Button up and stand to attention in these checked, striped, plain, casual and formal shirts, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day. Style these shirts with formal pants or jeans and up your style quotient.    Product Details  Maroon checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, short sleeves with mid button tabs, full buttoned placket, pockets on the front with flap button closure, embroidered branding on the pocket and a curved hem    Material and Care  100% cotton  Wash with similar colours  Iron on reverse side    Size and Fit  Regular Fit  The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
